article_theme: The decade-long, symbiotic partnership between Apple and TSMC is undergoing a structural shift as AI, driven by NVIDIA, overtakes Apple in leading-edge capacity demand, fundamentally altering foundry power dynamics, node optimization, and semiconductor capital expenditures.
structure_summary: The article begins with a historical retrospective of the Apple-TSMC alliance (the 'Anchor Tenant' era), transitions into quantitative analysis of wafer demand, packaging economics, and margin savings, and then pivots to the current disruption caused by AI/NVIDIA. It concludes with strategic forecasts for 2025-2035, analyzing geographic risks (Taiwan/Arizona) and the technical tug-of-war over future node optimization (A16 vs A14).

sections.title: Introduction
sections.section_role: Establishes the core thesis of the article, framing the Apple-TSMC relationship as a historically foundational alliance that is now being structurally disrupted by NVIDIA and the AI boom.
translation_notes: Ensure 'Anchor Tenant' is translated consistently as a foundational business concept (e.g., 锚定客户 or 基石客户).
Differentiate 'bleeding-edge' (often implying higher risk/cost, e.g., 尖端/流血前沿产能) from standard 'leading-edge' (先进制程).
Maintain a highly analytical, authoritative tone suitable for hardcore tech and finance readers.

sections.title: Anchor Tenant
sections.section_role: Quantifies Apple's role as the financial de-risker for TSMC's massive capital expenditures and details the gross margin expansion Apple achieved through this silicon internalization.
translation_notes: Translate 'de-risk investment' accurately in a financial context (e.g., 降低投资风险 / 为巨额投资兜底).
Translate 'wafer mix' as 晶圆需求结构 or 晶圆产品组合.
Ensure 'Gross Margins (GM)' and 'percentage point expansion' are translated strictly using standard financial terminology (毛利率, 百分点扩张).

sections.title: Key Numbers
sections.next_section_title: The Five Phases of Apple-TSMC Evolution
sections.section_role: Acts as a data dashboard, isolating the raw metrics on wafer demand and advanced packaging revenue to ground the narrative in undeniable facts.
translation_notes: Keep formatting clean and use standard industry abbreviations.
Translate 'Advanced Packaging as % of Revenue' precisely (先进封装占总营收比重).

sections.title: The Five Phases of Apple-TSMC Evolution
sections.section_role: Chronologically maps the evolution of the alliance to highlight the immense switching costs and lock-in effects that prevent Apple from easily moving to competitors.
translation_notes: Translate 'yield learning' as 良率爬坡 or 良率学习曲线.
Translate 'product cadence' as 产品发布节奏 or 产品迭代步调.
Ensure the translation captures the severity of 'switching costs' (转换成本) implied by the 2-3 year penalty.

sections.title: The Manufacturing Footprint
sections.previous_section_title: The Five Phases of Apple-TSMC Evolution
sections.section_role: Highlights the physical and technical divergence between Apple's and NVIDIA's needs, specifically focusing on the battleground of advanced packaging technologies.
translation_notes: Do not translate technical acronyms (InFO-PoP, CoWoS, HBM, SoC, DRAM), but provide brief Chinese contextual wrappers if necessary (e.g., 集成扇出型封装 InFO-PoP).
Preserve the contrast between 'stacked' (堆叠) and 'side-by-side' (并排/平铺) memory architectures.

sections.title: Geographic Concentration Risk
sections.section_role: Assesses the geopolitical vulnerability of the Apple-TSMC alliance and evaluates the efficacy of mitigation efforts like the Arizona fab.
translation_notes: Translate 'elephant in the room' idiomatically (e.g., 显而易见却被刻意回避的重大隐患 or 房间里的大象).
Translate 'token diversification' accurately to reflect its superficial nature (e.g., 象征性的多元化 or 点缀式的风险分散).
Maintain a neutral, objective tone regarding geopolitical risks.

sections.title: Apple’s Five Transformational Chip Acquisitions
sections.section_role: Details Apple's aggressive M&A strategy to internalize silicon design, culminating in a 'virtual IDM' relationship with TSMC that dictates process design.
translation_notes: Translate 'virtual IDM' as 虚拟IDM or 虚拟垂直整合制造模式.
Translate 'Process Design Kit (PDK)' as 工艺设计套件 (PDK).
Capture the intensity of 'ruthless' in a business context (e.g., 极其冷酷/极致的掌控欲).
